experiments.name: Yes+No Arbitrage Scanner
experiments.hypothesis: When Yes price + No price < $1.00 in a binary market, buying both sides is mathematically guaranteed profit. Top Polymarket traders extracted $40M+ this way in one year.
experiments.action: Add arbitrage scanner to bot — scan all active markets for Yes+No < $0.97 (after fees). Auto-enter both sides.

experiments.name: NEAR_CERTAIN Bet Size Scaling
experiments.hypothesis: NEAR_CERTAIN is profitable (93.6% WR, +$16.32) but makes <$0.23/trade. Research shows pros scale these to thousands of dollars per trade to generate real income. At $10/bet we need 4,000+ trades to make $1,000.
experiments.action: Test 5x bet size increase ($10→$50) on NEAR_CERTAIN. Downside: avg loss goes from $2.49 to $12.45. Need 93.6%+ WR sustained at higher sizes.

experiments.name: Polymarket vs Kalshi Price Arbitrage
experiments.hypothesis: Same events trade on both Polymarket and Kalshi with different prices. Buying the cheaper side on one platform and hedging on the other locks in profit. 6-cent spread = profit after fees.
experiments.action: Need active Kalshi account to test. Currently blocked on signup.

experiments.name: Gain/Loss Ratio Wallet Filter
experiments.hypothesis: Research shows elite copy traders target wallets with gain/loss ratio >2.0 (win $2 for every $1 lost). Current scoring uses Sharpe+ROI+trades but misses this metric.
experiments.action: Add gain/loss ratio to wallet composite score. Penalize wallets with ratio <1.5.
experiments.result: Implementing in wallet_analyzer.py — next wallet rescore run.

experiments.name: News Arbitrage — 30-60 Second Entry
experiments.hypothesis: Breaking news reprices markets within 30-60 seconds. Bot that monitors X/news feeds and enters before the crowd captures the repricing move.
experiments.source: Grok research — confirmed elite traders use this
experiments.action: Build news alert → xAI X-search → trade signal pipeline. Requires x_search API.

experiments.name: SHORT_TERM = Wallet Copy (Short Timeframe)
experiments.hypothesis: Instead of independently picking markets, copy elite wallet positions expiring within 14 days. Same wallets have been scoring >60% WR on LONG_TERM trades.
experiments.source: Shaun's original intent for SHORT_TERM engine
experiments.action: Rewrite run_short_term_scan() to copy elite wallet positions with end_date within SHORT_TERM_DAYS.

experiments.name: 10,050 Wallet Win Rate Scoring
experiments.hypothesis: All 10,050 wallets in all_wallets_raw.json have rank/PNL/volume data but no per-wallet win rate. Fetching actual closed trade win rates would dramatically improve which wallets we copy.
experiments.action: Run wallet_analyzer.py on all 10,050 wallets. Fetch closed trade activity for top 500. Calculate real win rate. Rescore composite = win_rate × Sharpe × ROI.
experiments.result: Partial — 134 elite wallets scored with Sharpe-estimated win rate. Full 10,050 scan pending (rate-limited).
